offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, inaccurate risk assessments cause uncompetitive pricing. We provide risk modeling instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate risk assessments lead to uncompetitive pricing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo videos
Participate in community forums for tool sharing
try_it: Let users try risk assessment templates and calculators on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
